mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, email FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username}
SELECT id, username, password, email FROM sys_user
select m.permission from sys_user u join user_role r on u.id = r.user_id join role_menu rm on rm.role_id = r.role_id join menu m on rm.menu_id = m.id where u.id = #{id};
